reviews.review_description:
I've been waiting for someone to put  racing games for VR. At least a couple are making efforts to do so. Unfortunately, like this one,  the graphics are sub par for today's VR technology. Barely even early arcade quality. This one does not deliver in that area either. I had a Formula-1 game on my old 386-16 pc, 2 decades ago, with standard VGA. It blew this away in graphics. There is no reason to skimp on intensive graphics with today's technology.

Suggestions:
1. Better, more realistic graphics.
2. Get rid of that "stare and wait" menu selection. Make it a pad touch or main button on thru controller.
3. Higher resolution graphics
4. Whole not an issue, but still would be nice, add ability to choose mph instead of kph.

CON:
-360p rezolution
-plain textures
-the car is huge around you
-one car
-can't look 360 degrees

PRO:
-motion controller
This game sucks, very poor controls

Fundamentals are there but overall this game could be some much more. Draw distance is a bit short in all directions. AA is also pretty fuzzy on my S6,  if there is any.  Game metrics could be where they can be seen all the time like the dash. I'll get back and update my review if you push changes in the future. Keep it up :)
I payed for this app but it won't load any one no what may be wrong.

developer_response.body: That the game do not start, can have a lot of reasons, many of them not related to the game itself. Anyway, in order to help, please send email to: support@fungamesmobile.com and describe what happens as detailed as possible. Please also tell which device you are using and if you know Android version, that would help.

reviews.review_title: Steering with my Head is awful
reviews.review_description: Was glad to see a Racer which uses the contoller. And bought  it. Graphics are ok but you have to steer Holding your Head left or right. Grinds my gears! If you Support Controllers i'll give it Another try.
the game is awsome and it is worth the money ao if your new to gear vr buy it now for onyl 2.99

developer_response.body: Hi, can you send me an email to support@fungamesmobile.com, and explain what happens, where it stops etc. and I will help you make it work. Also which device and android version are you running on.

reviews.review_description: Pop in makes me physically sick!

There are currently very few racing games for the Oculus Go, so when spotting this in the Oculus store was enthusiastic to try it out. But alas, it does not load! The developers really need to sort this problem. I'm sure the issue is not with my VR headset as everything else loads ok. Also I notice others are having the same issue.
